    Enum CadPlotStandardScaleType

    Standard scale type. CadPlotSettings

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.Cad.CadConsts
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    [ComVisible(false)]
public enum CadPlotStandardScaleType : short

    Scale1000To1

    Scale is 1000:1

    Scale100To1

    Scale is 100:1

    Scale10To1

    Scale is 10:1

    Scale1Min

    Scale is 1'=1'

    Scale1Sec

    Scale is 1"=1'

    Scale1To1

    Scale is 1:1

    Scale1To10

    Scale is 1:10

    Scale1To100

    Scale is 1:100

    Scale1To128Sec

    Scale is 1/128"=1'

    Scale1To16

    Scale is 1:16

    Scale1To16Sec

    Scale is 1/16"=1'

    Scale1To2

    Scale is 1:2

    Scale1To20

    Scale is 1:20

    Scale1To2Sec

    Scale is 1/2"=1'

    Scale1To30

    Scale is 1:30

    Scale1To32Sec

    Scale is 1/32"=1'

    Scale1To4

    Scale is 1:4

    Scale1To40

    Scale is 1:40

    Scale1To4Sec

    Scale is 1/4"=1'

    Scale1To50

    Scale is 1:50

    Scale1To64Sec

    Scale is 1/64"=1'

    Scale1To8

    Scale is 1:8

    Scale1To8Sec

    Scale is 1/8"=1'

    Scale2To1

    Scale is 2:1

    Scale3Sec

    Scale is 3"=1'

    Scale3To16Sec

    Scale is 3/16"=1'

    Scale3To32Sec

    Scale is 3/32"=1'

    Scale3To4Sec

    Scale is 3/4"=1'

    Scale3To8Sec

    Scale is 3/8"=1'

    Scale4To1

    Scale is 4:1

    Scale6Sec

    Scale is 6"=1'

    Scale8To1

    Scale is 8:1
